title: Xfce 4.20 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: After almost two years of work, we are happy to announce the release of Xfce 4.20 !

title: Xfce 4.18 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: After almost two years of work, we are happy to announce the release of Xfce 4.18 !

title: Xfce 4.16 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: Today, after 1 year and 4 months of work, we are happy to announce the release of the Xfce desktop 4.16, a new stable version that supersedes Xfce 4.14.

title: Xfce 4.14 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: Today, after 4 years and 5 months of work, we are pleased to announce the release of the Xfce desktop 4.14, a new stable version that supersedes Xfce 4.12.

title: Xfce 4.12 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: Today, after 2 years and 10 months of work, we are pleased to announce the release of the Xfce desktop 4.12, a new stable version that supersedes Xfce 4.10.

title: Xfce 4.10 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: Today, after 1 year and 4 months of work, we are pleased to announce the release of the Xfce desktop 4.10, a new stable version that supersedes Xfce 4.8.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: The Xfce development team is proud to announce the second preview release for Xfce 4.10. Together with this preview release, the Xfce project announces the string and code (only critical bug fixes or regressions) freeze for the final 4.10 release which is set to be pushed out to the world on April 28th, 2012.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: The Xfce development team is proud to announce the first preview release for Xfce 4.10. Together with this preview release, the Xfce project announces the feature freeze for the final 4.10 release which is set to be pushed out to the world on April 28th, 2012.

title: Xfce 4.8 released
author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: Today, after almost two years of work, we have the special pleasure of announcing the much awaited release of Xfce 4.8, the new stable version that supersedes Xfce 4.6.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: Today we are pleased to announce the third and hopefully final preview release of Xfce 4.8 which is set to be pushed out to the public on January 16th, 2011. Compared to Xfce 4.8pre2 this release mostly features translation updates and bug fixes.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: We are pleased to announce the second preview release of Xfce 4.8. This release marks the beginning of the string freeze. From today on until the final release, strings may no longer be changed in the master branch of Xfce core components. This will help translators to prepare their translations for the final release scheduled on January 16th, 2011.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: The Xfce development team is proud to announce the first preview release for Xfce 4.8. Together with this preview release, the Xfce project announces the feature freeze for the final 4.8 release which is set to be pushed out to the world on January 16th, 2011.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: The second bugfix-release of xfce 4.6 has been released.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: The first bugfix-release of xfce 4.6 has been released.

author: Release Manager
first_paragraph: After more than two years of development, Xfce 4.6.0 has just been released.
